description: Provides structured logging capabilities and a logger factory.

classes.name: StructuredLogger
classes.docstring: Provides structured logging capabilities with JSON formatting and context management.

methods.name: __init__
methods.docstring:
Initialize structured logger with a configuration dictionary.

        Args:
            name (str): The logger name (usually the module name).
            config (Dict[str, Any]): The logging configuration settings dictionary.

methods.name: _setup_handlers
methods.docstring: Setup file and console handlers with appropriate formatting.

methods.name: _create_json_formatter
methods.docstring: Create a JSON formatter for structured logging.

methods.name: _log_with_context
methods.docstring: Log a message with structured context.

classes.name: LoggerFactory
classes.docstring: Factory for creating configured logger instances.

methods.name: configure
methods.docstring:
Configure the logger factory with a Settings object.

        Args:
            settings (Settings): The application's settings object.

methods.name: get_logger
methods.docstring:
Get or create a logger instance.

        Args:
            name (str): The name of the logger.

        Raises:
            RuntimeError: If the factory has not been configured.

        Returns:
            StructuredLogger: A configured StructuredLogger instance.
